findings.title: Total line items exceed total budget
findings.why: The sum of all budget line items ($53,200) exceeds the total budget ($50,000) by $3,200, which is unsustainable.
findings.do: Review and adjust the budgeted amounts to align them with the total budget.

findings.title: Duplicate music vendor
findings.why: DJ Amir appears twice in the budget, suggesting a duplicate entry and double-counting of expenses for the music category.
findings.do: Confirm and remove any duplicate entries for DJ Amir.

findings.title: Overdue payments
findings.why: Payments to vendors Bella Vista Hall ($16,000) and Golden Hour Photography ($4,200) are overdue, risking negative credit or service cancellations.
findings.do: Prioritize settling overdue payments to maintain good standing with vendors and avoid service disruptions.

findings.title: Per-line overruns
findings.why: Bella Vista Hall and Golden Hour Photography have committed costs ($21,000 and $4,200 respectively) exceeding their budgeted amounts ($20,000 and $4,000), indicating potential overspending.
findings.do: Negotiate costs or reallocate funds to cover the overruns.
